title: ヴィクトリアマイルにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Kawakami Princess has come to keep her
promise.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well, you look better than last time.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I feel unstoppable, even. If I'm doing this, it
means I'm pummeling you all into the track on the
way.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heh, guess your spunk is back too...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to cherish this chance to compete
against someone of your skill and use it to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, with that out of the way...
All you fans of Umamusume racing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hold on, why'd you leave the stage?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess heads over to the fans
gathered by the paddock and begins exchanging
high-fives.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Haha, yeah, Princess! Me too!
What's she doing?! Heh... She's so strange.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Yep, that's the Kawakami I know!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for your support! I'm going to shine
ever brighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay true to myself as I reach for my ideals!
And as for the princesses racing today...
